notarial_certificate.issuing_office: 广东省深圳市深圳公证处

issuance_structure.holder_statement: The notarial certificate package was made in three corresponding sets. One set is retained by the Shenzhen Notary Office, and two sets were delivered to the holder. Each delivered set includes the notarial certificate and its paired sealed disc.

public_photo_record.note: The public GZ2 archive includes a photograph of one sealed disc as part of the redacted notarial-certificate photo supplement, but this record must not identify a TXID until visually confirmed.

supports: existence of holder-retained sealed disc material as photographed
custody relationship between the notarial certificate and paired sealed disc
holder-reported issuance structure: one set retained by notary office, two sets delivered to holder
future possibility of witnessed disc-content verification
does_not_yet_support: hash equality between disc contents and Cunzhengtong records
hash equality between disc contents and Arweave records

future_verification_protocol_if_opened: open under video recording or third-party witness
create ISO image of each disc
compare against Cunzhengtong certificate hashes and original preservation records
create OpenTimestamps proof for the disc-content manifest
upload the disc-content manifest and verification report to Arweave and GitHub Release
